name: qa-mobile-automation
description: Automatización mobile con WebdriverIO v9 + Appium — Piloto IntraMed

scripts.test:android: wdio run config/wdio.android.conf.ts && npm run report:open || npm run report:open
scripts.test:android:headless: wdio run config/wdio.android.headless.conf.ts && npm run report:open || npm run report:open
scripts.test:android:login: wdio run config/wdio.android.conf.ts --mochaOpts.grep "\[#login\]" && npm run report:open || npm run report:open
scripts.test:android:feed: wdio run config/wdio.android.conf.ts --mochaOpts.grep "\[#feed\]" && npm run report:open || npm run report:open
scripts.report: npm run report:generate && npm run report:open
